title: Middle East tensions rattle Asia markets after fresh U.S. strikes in Iran
summary_full: Asia-Pacific markets fell Thursday while oil prices surged after fresh U.S. strikes in Iran heightened fears of a wider Middle East conflict.
summary_public: Asia-Pacific markets fell Thursday while oil prices surged after fresh U.S. strikes in Iran heightened fears of a wider Middle East conflict.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: fresh U.S. strikes in Iran heightened fears of a wider Middle East conflict.
